'''dafuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xoanon|xoanon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xoanon|xoanon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dafuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæfijith|dæfijith]] || [[word:dæfijij|dæfijij]] || [[word:dæfijish|dæfijish]] || [[word:dæfiji|dæfiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafufujuth|dafufujuth]] || [[word:dafufujuj|dafufujuj]] || [[word:dafufujush|dafufujush]] || [[word:dafufuju|dafufuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafujuth|dafujuth]] || [[word:dafujuj|dafujuj]] || [[word:dafujush|dafujush]] || [[word:dafuju|dafuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafufjuth|dafufjuth]] || [[word:dafufjuj|dafufjuj]] || [[word:dafufjush|dafufjush]] || [[word:dafufjuf|dafufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dafujuthu|dafujuthu]] || [[word:dafujuju|dafujuju]] || [[word:dafujushu|dafujushu]] || [[word:dafujuku|dafujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dafujuth|dafujuth]] || [[word:dafujuj|dafujuj]] || [[word:dafujush|dafujush]] || [[word:dafuju|dafuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dafujuthul|dafujuthul]] || [[word:dafujujul|dafujujul]] || [[word:dafujushul|dafujushul]] || [[word:dafujukul|dafujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dafujuthuthu|dafujuthuthu]] || [[word:dafujujuju|dafujujuju]] || [[word:dafujushushu|dafujushushu]] || [[word:dafujuku|dafujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dafujuthun|dafujuthun]] || [[word:dafujujun|dafujujun]] || [[word:dafujushun|dafujushun]] || [[word:dafujukun|dafujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dafujuthuoro|dafujuthuoro]] || [[word:dafujujuoro|dafujujuoro]] || [[word:dafujushuoro|dafujushuoro]] || [[word:dafujukuoro|dafujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
